statute: Tennessee Code § 62-6-101 et seq. (Board for Licensing Contractors); § 62-6-503 (Home Improvement Law)
license_notes: GC license required for projects $25,000+. Home improvement license required in 9 specific counties (Bradley, Davidson, Hamilton, Haywood, Knox, Marion, Robertson, Rutherford, Shelby) for remodeling $3,000-$25,000. Six license classifications based on project type and size.

mandatory_clauses.label: Tennessee contractor license disclosure
Home improvement notice (9-county area)
mandatory_clauses.text: NOTICE: This contract is for home improvement work in a county that requires a Home Improvement License for projects between $3,000 and $25,000. Contractor's Home Improvement License Number: {{home_improvement_license}}

mandatory_clauses.label: Mechanics lien notice
mandatory_clauses.text:
NOTICE OF LIEN RIGHTS

Under state law, contractors, subcontractors, and material suppliers who provide labor or materials for your property and are not paid may have the right to file a mechanic's lien against your property. Even if you pay your general contractor in full, you may still be subject to liens from unpaid subcontractors and suppliers. Protect yourself by obtaining written lien waivers from all parties before making final payment.

mandatory_clauses.label: Federal 3-day right to cancel (TILA)
Not legal advice disclaimer
mandatory_clauses.text: DISCLAIMER: This contract was generated by ContractorDesk as a starting point template. It does not constitute legal advice. Contractors are encouraged to have a licensed attorney review agreements for their specific situation and applicable state requirements.

penalties_for_non_compliance: Class A misdemeanor (up to 1 year jail, $2,500 fine). Board can fine up to $5,000 per offense and revoke license. Persons hiring unlicensed contractors for >$25,000 also commit Class A misdemeanor. Unlicensed residential contractors lose lien rights.
notes: Tennessee has 6 contractor license classifications based on project type and value. License required for projects $25,000+. Special home improvement license required for remodeling $3,000-$25,000 in 9 specific counties (Bradley, Davidson, Hamilton, Haywood, Knox, Marion, Robertson, Rutherford, Shelby). Both the contractor AND the person who hires an unlicensed contractor face criminal charges. Tennessee has extensive reciprocity with many states. Residential unlicensed contractors lose lien rights.
